title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build agentic AI applications using Claude Code across three interfaces: desktop app, terminal, and VS Code integration. The example application generates personalized resumes and cover letters with skill suggestions and improvement recommendations.
